selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest remaining archive-boundary reduction target on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the archive-root policy, demotion lineage, generated mirrors, and tier topology into controller-facing archive boundaries.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next contradiction packet after the archive boundary layer is isolated.
Strongest next math-class fence once the archive boundary packet is cleared.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the archive-root boundary, demotion, mirror, topology, and historical-maturity packet tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVE_ROOT_IS_RETENTION_NOT_ACTIVE_INPUT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the archive plaque and migration-root lineage into a controller archive-only boundary.

candidate_items.name: DEMOTION_PRECEDES_RESIDUE_THINNING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the archive's demotion-first and cleanup-later sequence as a controller operation rule.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVE_MIRRORS_ARE_LOOKUP_NOT_AUTHORITY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the archive-root mirror layer into a controller rule against authority overread.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVE_TIERS_REQUIRE_FAMILY_SPECIFIC_ROUTING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the root tier topology and heat-dump dominance into a controller routing fence.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVED_PROCESS_AUDIT_IS_HISTORICAL_NOT_CURRENT_STATE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the lower-pass and upper-incomplete process snapshot as dated history rather than current status truth.

quarantined_items.name: BRAIN_SHAPED_ARCHIVE_MIRRORS_AS_ACTIVE_MEMORY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Archive-only classification remains explicit even when mirror filenames look like live memory surfaces.

quarantined_items.name: CLEANUP_DELETION_AS_UNIVERSAL_ARCHIVE_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The archive retains demotion-first preservation and later residue-thinning as distinct behaviors.

notes: This batch was produced after the earlier nine controller-facing A2-mid reductions as the tenth bounded controller reduction in this audit pass.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
